title: Fake Mobs
description: adds fake mobs that you can craft into minecraft
body:
Adds 5 Fake Mobs and 4 Fake Players With Recipes, Give Me Your Mc Username and Recipe if you want to be added (players are not being added anymore)
1. Fake Pig
2. Fake Panda
3. Fake Cow
4. Fake Sheep
5. Fake Bee
6. Fake Player
7. Fake Player (Username)
